calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey D. Wohl, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Department 525)

Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant, Justo Valves, is present in propria persona, on behalf of Subway.

Respondent/Plaintiff, John McClain, Jr. is present in propria persona.

9:15 a.m.
This matter comes on calendar for Trial De Novo. The parties sign the stipulation to use Judge Pro Tem to hear the trial. All parties are sworn.

Respondent, John McClain, Jr., testifies on his own behalf. Appellant, Justo Valdez, testifies on his own behalf.

After hearing all oral testimony, the Court takes the matter under submission. Exhibits previously received from the Small Claims remains in the file.

(The minutes reflecting the exhibits were amended on 3/17/09, by Carla Contreras, due to clerical error)

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-09-2009 Off Calendar

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Judgment Entered
